headline: Is It Time To Revisit American Tower (AMT) After Its Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you are wondering whether American Tower is priced attractively today, or if the current level already reflects its potential, this article walks you through what the numbers say about value. The stock last closed at US$185.07, with a 7 day return of a 0.6% decline, a 30 day return of a 3.7% decline, and a 5.9% gain year to date, while the 1 year return sits at a 10.8% decline. These mixed returns over different time frames suggest shifting sentiment. Some investors may see renewed...
